name: ship-inbox
description: The Ship's human-action inbox (Ship_Spec §5): one page aggregating everything that needs a human across all projects -- a permission-request queue resolved from the browser (the Crew plugin's PermissionRequest hook long-polls the decision), agent questions from Notification hooks, and Chart Room's unanswered ask-me / open actions items via the in-process station contract. 'Always allow' writes a native permission rule into that project's .claude/settings.local.json (additive, atomic, backed up). Mounted into `ship serve` as a Deck station; also ships its own standalone `ship-inbox` bin.
